---
title: "smoke.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/test/smoke.test.ts"
loc: 100
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.65
style_score: 8.18
intel_score: 7.80
overall_score: 8.54
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [createCache](file://@turso/cachebro)
- [writeFileSync](file://fs)
- [mkdirSync](file://fs)
- [rmSync](file://fs)
- [join](file://path)

### Exports
- `TEST_DIR`
- `DB_PATH`
- `FILE_PATH`
- `createCache`
- `r1`
- `r2`
- `r3`
- `stats`
- `cache2`
- `r5`
- `r5b`
- `LONG_FILE`
- `longContent`
- `r6`
- `r7`
- `modifiedLines`
- `r8`
- `r9`
